questionHtml: Suggest a technique for measuring the percentage mass of calcium carbonate in this type of antacid tablet.
markschemeHtml:
«back» titration

OR

thermal decomposition

OR

atomic absorption/AA ✔

 

Accept “gravimetric analysis”.

Do not accept description of a technique without proper term given for the technique.
